_comment: Faithful extraction of clements49.blend -> build123d B-rep solids. Each entry maps a blend object family (joined) to a functional harp part, reconstructed by slicing the exported mesh along `axis` into `N` cross-sections (each arc-length-resampled to `M` points, CCW, consistent start) and lofting (ruled). Geometry (STL/brep/sections) is derived from the licensed TurboSquid model and is gitignored; only this manifest + the pipeline code are tracked. Regenerate with recon/build_recon.py.

strings.note: 47 endpoints already measured into clements49_params.STRINGS; +2 bass extrapolated for the 49-set

verification.method: bbox + volume vs source mesh; visual HLR side-view confirmed harp silhouette
